summary: Tested the newly implemented InkBook Admin Panel - all 11 sidebar sections, 18 backend API endpoints. Backend: 18/18 tests pass. Frontend: all sections render, navigate, and function correctly.

minor.issue: AnnouncementCreate model uses 'text' field (not 'title'/'content'). Frontend AdminPage.js uses matching 'text' field, so no real issue - just noted for API consumer clarity.

integration_issues.issue: On page load, two 401 errors appear in console for notification API calls before cookie auth is established. Non-blocking, but slightly noisy.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays bottom portion of every section but is closeable

critical_code_review_comments: AdminPage.js is 921 lines - borderline; consider splitting section components into separate files for maintainability.
AnnouncementCreate model field 'text' is used (not 'title'/'content') - ensure documentation/frontend is consistent.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 12 sidebar sections load and render correctly)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Test FAQ item created and cleaned up during test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully tested at iteration 19. All API endpoints return 200. All 12 sidebar sections navigate and render. Studios, Nutzer, Buchungen, Abonnements, Einnahmen, Bewertungen, FAQ, Ankündigungen, Newsletter, Broadcast, Support-Tickets, Meldungen all working. Key credentials: admin@inkbook.com / admin123.
